creator: ada@not-enough.bandwidth.org
text:
The phone number listed for Advanced Multimedia Distributors on the FAQ
section 1.14 (Where can I get FreeBSD?)  is wrong and does not conform to
Australian phone number standards.

it is listed as +61 3 9338 67777
which is one digit extra.

Fix: 

Change to +61 3 9338 6777
